  1. org.springframework.ai.deepseek.api

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.deepseek.api

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.deepseek.api
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.deepseek
 
org.springframework.ai.deepseek.api
 
org.springframework.ai.model.deepseek.autoconfigure
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.deepseek.api used by org.springframework.ai.deepseek
    Class
    Description
    DeepSeekApi
    Single class implementation of the DeepSeek Chat Completion API.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatModel
    DeepSeek Chat Completion Models
    DeepSeekApi.FunctionTool
    Represents a tool the model may call.
    ResponseFormat
    An object specifying the format that the model must output.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.deepseek.api used by org.springframework.ai.deepseek.api
    Class
    Description
    DeepSeekApi
    Single class implementation of the DeepSeek Chat Completion API.
    DeepSeekApi.Builder
     
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletion
    Represents a chat completion response returned by model, based on the provided input.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletion.Choice
    Chat completion choice.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletionChunk
    Represents a streamed chunk of a chat completion response returned by model, based on the provided input.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletionChunk.ChunkChoice
    Chat completion choice.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletionFinishReason
    The reason the model stopped generating tokens.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletionMessage
    Message comprising the conversation.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ChatCompletionFunction
    The function definition.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role
    The role of the author of this message.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ToolCall
    The relevant tool call.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatCompletionRequest
    Creates a model response for the given chat conversation.
    DeepSeekApi.ChatModel
    DeepSeek Chat Completion Models
    DeepSeekApi.FunctionTool
    Represents a tool the model may call.
    DeepSeekApi.FunctionTool.Function
    Function definition.
    DeepSeekApi.FunctionTool.Type
    Create a tool of type 'function' and the given function definition.
    DeepSeekApi.LogProbs
    Log probability information for the choice.
    DeepSeekApi.LogProbs.Content
    Message content tokens with log probability information.
    DeepSeekApi.LogProbs.Content.TopLogProbs
    The most likely tokens and their log probability, at this token position.
    DeepSeekApi.Usage
    Usage statistics for the completion request.
    DeepSeekApi.Usage.PromptTokensDetails
    Breakdown of tokens used in the prompt
    ResponseFormat
    An object specifying the format that the model must output.
    ResponseFormat.Builder
     
    ResponseFormat.Type

    Class
    Description
    ResponseFormat
    An object specifying the format that the model must output.
